command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1556.006 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1556.006'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1556.006 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

sigma.title: Azure AD Only Single Factor Authentication Required
AWS Identity Center Identity Provider Change
Disabled MFA to Bypass Authentication Mechanisms
CA Policy Removed by Non Approved Actor
CA Policy Updated by Non Approved Actor

osquery.name: t1556_006_shadow_read
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE (target_path LIKE '%shadow%' OR target_path LIKE '%passwd%' OR target_path LIKE '%.ssh/%' OR target_path LIKE '%credential%') LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1556_006_proc_cred
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%shadow%' OR cmdline LIKE '%passwd%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mimikatz%' OR cmdline LIKE '%credential%' OR cmdline LIKE '%hashdump%' LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1556_006_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Azure AD Only Single Factor Authentication Required
AWS Identity Center Identity Provider Change

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 10 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
